description_long: This is an above-ground, octagonal jacuzzi with a wooden exterior frame and a bright blue interior water basin. The jacuzzi features a set of wooden steps with three treads on one side, providing easy access to the water. Metal handrails are installed at the entry point for safety, and a visible orange filtration or pump unit is attached to the exterior wall. The water inside appears clean and nearly fills the basin, with the surface reflecting light. The structure is supported by multiple base feet, ensuring stability on flat surfaces, and the overall design is robust and suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description: An octagonal, above-ground jacuzzi with a wooden exterior, blue water, metal handrails, and attached steps. Features a visible pump unit and is nearly full of water.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden steps and metal handrails leading into the jacuzzi.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the jacuzzi, steps on the left, and the orange pump unit on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pump unit and the opposite side of the handrails, with no steps visible.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction, showing the handrails on the right and the pump unit on the left.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water close to the top edge
